issue.title: www.merlininkazani.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.merlininkazani.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.merlininkazani.com%2F) ### Comment > AdGuard filters contains 13 obsolete/unused rules specifically for the Merlin'in Kazanı website (they no longer match anything). > > Please review and remove these outdated rules to clean up the filter. > > --- > > > merlininkazani.com##.author-share .share > merlininkazani.com##div[class^="adver-mobile-"] > merlininkazani.com##.header-ads > > ||merlininkazani.com/sayac > > ! https://github.com/uBlockOrigin/uAssets/issues/18716 > ||merlininkazani.com/js/abdetector.script.min.js > > merlininkazani.com##.detail > div[style*="min-height:"]:has(> div[id^="protag-MPU"]) > > merlininkazani.com##.leader-board-row > > merlininkazani.com##a[href^="/banner-gosterimi?id="] > > merlininkazani.com###billboard_banner > merlininkazani.com###billboard_kapat > > ||merlininkazani.com/banner/ > merlininkazani.com##.adsbygoogle > merlininkazani.com##div[id^="div-gpt-ad"] > > > ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/aieh36xsc68ko4owswocos80o0wc8skf05t69la7c0.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.72 MV3 System version: | `Windows 10` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**

AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

issue.title: rou.video

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [NSFW] [https://rou.video/v/cmqna54850000s6mfqo43tb8t](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Frou.video%2Fv%2Fcmqna54850000s6mfqo43tb8t) ### Comment > Thumbnail missing on the side with adguard enable. unless use this rule `@@||rou.video^$specifichide.` ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/13z41imszkpw8448g8c0ooc400c4gw8g5jz0y8na5c.png?nc=1) [Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/a7kdpv88ucgkos4c4cckcw4wg8kwcw0mo96l8y54hw.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.9 (5282) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.26200.0` Browser: | brave License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | WFP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
